array.string: mkdir -p "$HOME/Library/Application Support/gold-monitor/.state" "$HOME/Library/Logs/gold-monitor"; exec /usr/bin/env PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 "$HOME/Library/Application Support/gold-monitor/gold_monitor.py" >> "$HOME/Library/Logs/gold-monitor/gold_monitor.log" 2>> "$HOME/Library/Logs/gold-monitor/gold_monitor.err.log"
